branch_scope.carrier: the certified quotient-visible twelve-port carrier lineage of the pinned reference manifest
branch_scope.declared_response_data: four exact A5-equivariant response band scales and one common odd-response sign, typed as separately measured reversible response automorphism data
branch_scope.not_claimed: no statement about arbitrary OPH carriers, no derivation of the response data from raw consensus dynamics, no identification with the physical Standard Model gauge group

charged_faithfulness.central_charge: the central generator acts as i*(unit scale) on the even sector and 0 on the kernel sector
charged_faithfulness.equivariant_charge_rigidity: an equivariant lift either charges the response space through the scalar central character or degenerates to a rank-deficient map

claim_boundary.closes: PORT-CURRENT-INNER on the declared echosahedral response branch
claim_boundary.declared_source_data: the four A5-equivariant response band scales and the common odd-response sign are declared reversible-response source data, not derived from raw consensus dynamics
does_not_close: derivation of the response scales or the response space from raw OPH consensus dynamics
matter attachment, family structure, and exterior package selection
continuum Yang-Mills quantum field theory, couplings, masses, or any measured number

classification_vs_realization.coefficient_layer: the compact-Lie trichotomy classifies coefficient algebras; coefficient records can commute
classification_vs_realization.physical_layer: this receipt constructs current operators on a faithful charged response space with nonabelian closure and an inner A5 action
classification_vs_realization.separating_witness: the abelian record model matches the coefficient module yet fails the physical-current gate with CENTER_NOT_ONE_DIMENSIONAL

closure.central_u1_kernel: the adjoint action kills exactly the constant even port line
closure.derived_type_identification: commutators are traceless, so the eight-dimensional even derived block is exactly su(3) and the three-dimensional kernel derived block is so(3)

compactness.conclusion: the current algebra carries an invariant positive-definite form, hence is of compact type

downstream: a5_screen_sm_closure.py and exterior_sm_completion.py reference this closure in their gate ledgers; this receipt does not consume them
dependency_acyclicity_note.summary: the proof-level dependency graph is acyclic: carrier packet -> response packet -> current receipt -> ledger references
upstream: manifests/echosahedral_federation_reference.json and its receipt (strictly upstream carrier packet)
the exact Q(sqrt5) coordinate model and the declared response manifest

derivation_chain.conclusion: the source packet is admissible: four exact band scales, one common odd sign, repairs excluded from currents
derivation_chain.premise: declared response manifest with firewall and repair/response typing

derivation_chain.conclusion: unit split, antipode, faithful proper A5 action (60 permutations), distances, oriented faces, refinement tower re-derived
120 distance isometries, exactly 60 orientation-matched: one proper orbit of oriented frame realizations
derivation_chain.premise: exact coordinate model: cyclic permutations of (0, +/-1, +/-phi) over Q(sqrt5)

derivation_chain.conclusion: the four isotypic response bands are separated inside Q(sqrt5); sigma(U) kills the frame band and isolates the kernel band
derivation_chain.premise: antipode band split and the frame map U d = (1/2) sum_p f_p v_p

derivation_chain.conclusion: injective port-to-generator map, image real dimension 12 with verified block dimensions (9, 3) and real kernel block
derivation_chain.premise: declared band scales attached to the derived band maps

derivation_chain.conclusion: K(g.f) = Pi(g) K(f) Pi(g)* for the full derived icosahedral action
derivation_chain.premise: implementers solved exactly from the frame transport R_g v_p = v_{g(p)}

derivation_chain.conclusion: commutator-closed algebra with one-dimensional center on the constant even port line, derived dimension 11, adjoint rank 11; derived type su(3) (+) so(3)
derivation_chain.premise: all 66 basis brackets solved in the span

derivation_chain.conclusion: invariant positive-definite form: compact type, with exact band coefficients
derivation_chain.premise: Hilbert-Schmidt pullback of the response pairing

derivation_chain.conclusion: every implementer is exp of an element of the current image, so the induced A5 action lies in Int(g)
derivation_chain.premise: odd bands jointly surject onto both skew blocks (exact rank six)
uses: 60 exact Rodrigues rotation normal forms in Q(sqrt5)

derivation_chain.conclusion: the current construction is natural along the declared refinement tower
equivariant lifts form exactly the four-scale family with one common odd sign; the block allocation is forced
derivation_chain.premise: Burnside count of the port action and exact character arithmetic
uses: kernel-band multiplicity 0 in the even block

derivation_chain.conclusion: the physical-current gate passes on the reference packet and fails closed on every countermodel

factor_origins.band_coefficients_1/4_3+sqrt5_5+sqrt5_5-: traces of the pullback form against the exact band projectors at unit scales; the frame/kernel pair is Galois-conjugate because the kernel band is realized through the Galois-twisted frame intertwiner
factor_origins.checks_720_3600: 60 automorphisms times 12 basis fields; 60 times 60 implementer products
factor_origins.counts_120_60: distance isometries onto the coordinate model and the orientation-matched proper subset
factor_origins.derived_11_center_1_adjoint_rank_11: rank of the bracket span, nullity of the exact centralizer system, and their difference
factor_origins.dimensions_12_9_3: exact ranks of the flattened generators and their block projections over Q(sqrt5)
factor_origins.moduli_4: Burnside sum 240 of squared fixed-port counts divided by the group order 60
factor_origins.order_five_cosines_(-1+-sqrt5)/4: traces of the order-five rotation implementers, Galois-paired across the two blocks

frame_realization.arithmetic_field: Q(sqrt5), no floating point in any proof decision
frame_realization.coordinate_model: twelve unnormalized icosahedron vertices, cyclic permutations of (0, +/-1, +/-phi)
frame_realization.equivalence: realizations form one proper orbit; exact band coefficients verified equal for an alternative orientation-matched realization

kernel_band_schur_rigidity.conclusion: the kernel band cannot act on the even sector; the block allocation is forced

inner_action.conclusion: every implementer is exp of an element of the current image, so the induced A5 action lies in Int(g)

band_realization.frame_band: real cross-product generators hat(U d) on the even block
band_realization.kernel_band: Galois-twisted cross-product generators hat(sigma(U) d) on the kernel block
band_realization.quintet_band: i * traceless symmetric axis quadrupoles on the even block
band_realization.unit_band: i * (scale) * identity on the even block: the central u(1)

response_moduli.burnside_rank_check: sum of squared fixed-port counts over A5 equals 240 = 4 * 60

source_definedness.domain: real port fields on the twelve primitive central atoms of the certified carrier
source_definedness.inner_product: standard Hermitian pairing on the charged double-triplet response space C^3 (+) C^3
source_definedness.operators: K built from the derived oriented frame, the Galois-twisted kernel intertwiner, and the declared response scales
source_definedness.refinement_maps: the declared carrier tower maps, each intertwined by the current lift
source_definedness.response_pairing: Hilbert-Schmidt pullback -Re tr(K(f)K(f')) with exact band coefficients

uses_only: irreversible strict-descent repair ledger (excluded from currents)
